plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: RunRealm uses your location to record runs and claim territories, including while the screen is off so your run isn't lost.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: RunRealm needs your location to record runs and claim territories.

infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: RunRealm records your run path even when the screen is off so you don't lose progress mid-run.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RunRealm uses your location to record runs and claim territories.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: RunRealm uses motion data to improve run accuracy.
